verdict.summary: Action server is not running. Common with Nav2, MoveIt2, or custom action servers that take time to start.

dead_ends.action: Launch the action client before the server is up without any wait
dead_ends.why_fails: Action calls will silently fail or raise confusing 'goal rejected' errors

dead_ends.action: Replace action with service call for long-running tasks
dead_ends.why_fails: Services block the caller and provide no feedback or cancellation support

workarounds.action: Use wait_for_server() with appropriate timeout before sending goals
Check action server is running with ros2 action list
Ensure server node dependencies (TF, costmap) are fully initialized before accepting goals

preceded_by.condition: Nav2 action server waits for TF and does not advertise until transforms are ready
